ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parks" (
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the park (e.g., Sandusky, Ohio) */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* The date the park opened */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the park */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The contact email for the park */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The contact phone number for the park */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* The average ticket price for the park */,
  "total_ride_count" INTEGER /* The total number of rides in the park */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* The average rating of all rides in the park */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park where the ride is located */,
  "ride_name" TEXT /* Name of the ride */,
  "supplier" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the ride */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the ride was built */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of ride */,
  "height_requirement" INTEGER /* The minimum height requirement for the ride */,
  "max_height" INTEGER /* The maximum height requirement for the ride */,
  "speed" REAL /* The maximum speed of the ride */,
  "length" REAL /* The length of the ride in meters */,
  "duration" REAL /* The duration of the ride in seconds */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* The maximum number of people the ride can hold at once */,
  "wait_time" INTEGER /* The average wait time for the ride */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* The date of the last inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the ride */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_supplier FOREIGN KEY ("supplier") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_park_id FOREIGN KEY ("park_id") REFERENCES parks ("park_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES ride_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride being ranked */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the ride */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points the ride received */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ranking was given */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* The number of reviews the ride has received */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* The average rating of the ride */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "wait_time" INTEGER /* The wait time experienced by the user */,
  "ride_status" TEXT /* The status of the ride during the review */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the visit */,
  "ride_experience" TEXT /* A detailed description of the ride experience */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Whether the user recommends the ride */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, park manager, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* The first name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* The last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The date of birth of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* The URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the supplier was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* The headquarters location of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerankings" (
  "preranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each previous ranking */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride being ranked */,
  "prerank" INTEGER /* Previous rank of the ride */,
  "prepoints" INTEGER /* Previous number of points the ride received */,
  "preyear" INTEGER /* Previous year the ranking was given */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* The number of reviews the ride had at the time of the previous ranking */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* The average rating of the ride at the time of the previous ranking */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the previous ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerankings_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "cost" REAL /* The cost of the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the update */,
  "responsible_team" TEXT /* The team responsible for the update */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* The estimated date of completion for the update */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* The actual date of completion for the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_updates_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* The level of the permission */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* The date the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* The contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* The headquarters location of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "min_height" INTEGER /* The minimum height requirement for the ride type */,
  "max_height" INTEGER /* The maximum height requirement for the ride type */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* The average speed of rides of this type */,
  "average_length" REAL /* The average length of rides of this type */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* The average duration of rides of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
